_comment: MOMO's baseline for the compare-youtube-channels skill. Niche is canonical per context/work.md (faceless ranking Shorts). Keep handles/metrics/named_competitors current as you learn them. YouTube channel stats are gated to scraping, so 'unknown' is honest — fill only what you can cite.
niche: Faceless ranking / Top-N list Shorts (entertainment, fast-paced)

key_metrics.subscribers: unknown (small/new channel; YouTube stats gated to scraping)

known_weaknesses: Wants stronger hooks/retention, more viral picks, faster subscriber growth

named_competitors.name: FailArmy
named_competitors.note: Format benchmark for the fails genre; ruthless clip curation with the best moment front-loaded. Stats scrape-gated (est. ~20M+ subs).

named_competitors.name: America's Funniest Videos (AFV)
named_competitors.note: Premium clip library, clean captions, family-safe shareability; strong Shorts arm. Stats scrape-gated (est. ~20M+ subs).

named_competitors.name: Top-5/Top-10 faceless countdown creators
named_competitors.note: MOMO's true format twins — same #N countdown, no brand moat; they live/die on hook + topic. Win them on cold-open teaser, kinetic reveals, and curiosity-gap topics.

goals: Make the ranking Shorts more viral and higher-quality, then expand to TikTok/Instagram. 'Exceeding' rivals = better hooks, higher retention, more views per Short, faster subscriber growth.
